prompt: Act as a creative director and propose five safe, kid‑friendly book club discussion questions for a fantasy novel.
response:
nobody knows the book better than you, so you can easily come up with questions that will get your kids talking about the book.
A book club is a group of people who meet to discuss a book or books that they have read. Book clubs can be found in many types of institutions, including schools, prisons, and hospitals. Book clubs can also be found in many different types of communities, including neighborhoods, churches, and social clubs.
